Initial implementation of readon.gr - Greek Reddit clone

- Set up Next.js 15 with TypeScript and Tailwind CSS
- Added Supabase integration for database and authentication
- Created comprehensive database schema with posts, comments, votes, and profiles
- Implemented basic UI components including header and post cards
- Added Greek language support with sample content
- Configured project structure with proper TypeScript types
- Added MIT license for open source distribution

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.ai/code)

Implement modern UI with theming and brand integration

- Add custom readon.gr logo with gradient purple-to-cyan design
- Install and configure shadcn/ui component system
- Implement dark/light/system theme switching with next-themes
- Modernize header with sticky positioning and backdrop blur
- Update color system to use readon brand colors across themes
- Replace basic UI with professional components and improved UX

Fix theming and improve dark mode experience

- Lighten dark theme background from harsh black to comfortable gray
- Replace hardcoded white/gray colors with theme-aware CSS variables
- Update post cards to use bg-card, text-foreground, and border-border
- Improve dark mode accessibility with better contrast ratios
- Replace img with optimized Next.js Image component
- Ensure consistent theming across all components and states
